name: Pipeline B - Onboarding to v2 Agent

parameters.jsCode:
return $input.all().map(item => {
  const { transcript, account_id } = item.json;

  const prompt = `You are an expert at extracting structured business configuration from onboarding call transcripts.
Extract ONLY the fields that are explicitly confirmed in this onboarding call. Return ONLY valid JSON, no explanation, no markdown.
Return this structure with only the fields you find:
{
  "account_id": "${account_id}",
  "company_name": "",
  "business_hours": { "days": "", "start": "", "end": "", "timezone": "" },
  "office_address": "",
  "services_supported": [],
  "emergency_definition": [],
  "emergency_routing_rules": { "primary": "", "order": [], "fallback": "" },
  "non_emergency_routing_rules": "",
  "call_transfer_rules": { "timeout_seconds": null, "retries": null, "message_if_fails": "" },
  "integration_constraints": [],
  "after_hours_flow_summary": "",
  "office_hours_flow_summary": "",
  "questions_or_unknowns": [],
  "notes": ""
}

Rules:
- Only extract what is EXPLICITLY confirmed. Do not guess.
- Leave fields blank / empty if not mentioned.
- Return ONLY the JSON object.

Transcript:
${transcript}`;

  return { json: { account_id, transcript, prompt } };
});

nodes.name: Merge and Patch v1 to v2

main.node: Merge and Patch v1 to v2
